name: C/p Smothered Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into stew-sized chunks.
2. Wash and cut the mushrooms in half.
3. In a large pot, sauté the chicken until lightly browned.
4. Add the mushrooms to the pot and continue cooking until they are softened.
5. Stir in all of the soup cans (cream of mushroom, cream of chicken, and French onion).
6. Add celery and baby corn if using.
7. Simmer for about 1 hour, or cook in a crockpot until dinner time.
8. Serve over rice, noodles, or potatoes.
